name: SumberYAML all provider bucket filter patch
description: Fetch all extra V2Ray sources, TCP-check alive vmess/vless/trojan nodes, bucket provider nodes into input/google.txt, input/oracle.txt, input/microsoft.txt, input/amazon.txt, input/digitalocean.txt, input/melbikom.txt, and input/vultr.txt; supports additional URLs via input/extra_sources_urls.txt.
